scenes.text:
You take up space in this
world. Stop apologizing for it.

Over-apologizing is a confidence killer. Sorry for asking. Sorry to bother you. Sorry for having an opinion. Every unnecessary sorry chips
away at your self-worth. It tells your brain and everyone around you that you do not deserve to be here.

Replace sorry with thank you. Instead of sorry for being late, say thank you for waiting.
Instead of sorry for talking, say thank you for listening. The energy shift is massive.

You have every right to take up
space, have opinions, and be heard.

Catch yourself apologizing today. Swap
it. Follow for confidence hacks.
